scripts.build: docker compose --profile bot run --rm --no-deps bot pnpm turbo run build
scripts.typecheck: docker compose --profile bot run --rm --no-deps bot pnpm turbo run typecheck
scripts.clean: docker compose --profile bot run --rm --no-deps bot pnpm turbo run clean
scripts.test: docker compose --profile bot run --rm bot pnpm turbo run test
scripts.test:watch: docker compose --profile bot run --rm bot pnpm --filter @fluxcore/bot test:watch
scripts.test:coverage: docker compose --profile bot run --rm bot pnpm --filter @fluxcore/bot test:coverage
scripts.deploy:commands: docker compose --profile bot run --rm --no-deps bot pnpm turbo run deploy:commands --filter=@fluxcore/bot
scripts.db:generate: docker compose --profile bot run --rm --no-deps bot pnpm turbo run db:generate --filter=@fluxcore/database
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose --profile bot run --rm bot pnpm --filter @fluxcore/database db:migrate
scripts.db:deploy: docker compose --profile bot run --rm bot pnpm --filter @fluxcore/database db:deploy
scripts.db:studio: docker compose --profile bot run --rm -p 5555:5555 bot pnpm --filter @fluxcore/database db:studio
